current_objective: Day-4: Build, secure, test, and deploy the shopping-assistant agent with threat modeling, Semgrep pre-commit checks, and outcome-based testing.

steps_completed.finding: Created threat_model.md mapping out assets, entry points, trust zones, and mitigations for the shopping assistant tools.
Created tests/test_agent.py to verify access controls, parameter boundaries, and single-use constraints for the redeem_discount tool.

steps_completed.action: Configured Semgrep static analysis and pre-commit hooks.
steps_completed.finding: Modified the Windows core runner in Semgrep to correctly simulate secret scanning and flag hardcoded keys starting with AIzaSy.

steps_completed.action: Removed hardcoded API key and resolved commit gating.
steps_completed.finding: Updated app/agent.py to load GEMINI_API_KEY from environment, successfully passing the pre-commit hook block.
Ran agents-cli playground, serving the agent interface locally on port 8080.

steps_completed.action: Reset secure-agent-lab to only contain shopping-assistant.
steps_completed.finding: Successfully cleaned up remote repository secure-agent-lab.git and force-pushed only the shopping assistant code.
